themes.title: Notification Performance
themes.description: Enhancing the speed and reliability of notification delivery.

themes.title: User Preferences
themes.description: Allowing users to customize their notification settings.

milestones.name: MVP - Reduce Notification Delivery Latency
milestones.description: Implement the core functionality to reduce notification delivery latency.
milestones.success_criteria: Achieve a 50% reduction in notification delivery latency.

milestones.name: V1 - User Preference Page and Monitoring
milestones.description: Develop user preference page and monitoring for notification delivery performance.
milestones.success_criteria: User preference page is live and 90% of notifications are monitored for performance.

milestones.name: V2 - Gather User Feedback
milestones.description: Implement feedback mechanisms for user preferences.
milestones.success_criteria: Collect feedback from at least 100 users on notification preferences.

sequencing.reason: The V1 milestone requires the MVP functionality of reduced notification delivery latency to be completed first.
The V2 milestone depends on the completion of the user preference page and monitoring features in V1.

mvp.goal: Establish a foundation for notification delivery with reduced latency.

v1.goal: Enhance user experience through preferences and performance monitoring.

v2.goal: Gather user feedback to improve notification preferences.
